entities.name: Careerspan
entities.context: V's company focused on career discovery and coaching, positioned as neutral third party in hiring

entities.name: Information Asymmetry
entities.context: Principle that power dynamics distort candidate-employer communication, incentivizing performance over honesty

entities.name: Safe Container
entities.context: Framework for creating psychological safety that enables extraction of higher-truth-value data

entities.name: Interview Persona
entities.context: The performance mask candidates adopt in direct employer interactions to hide weaknesses

entities.name: Neutral Intermediary
entities.context: Third party position that reduces perceived risk of honesty in hiring relationships

entities.name: ATS
entities.context: Applicant Tracking System representing the transactional side of hiring that Careerspan should remain distinct from

relationships.context: Strategic positioning as 'Switzerland' of hiring to elicit honest candidate data
Core value proposition enabling deep reflection separate from employer brand
Power dynamics cause candidates to mask weaknesses and perform rather than be honest
Neutrality enables psychological safety required for honest self-reflection
Must maintain distinct brand identity separate from employer's ATS to preserve psychological safety
